text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is well-documented. The real title is "Max-pooling convolutional neural networks for vision-based hand gesture recognition" (the cited title "Maxpooling" vs. the real "Max-pooling" is a trivial formatting difference). The authors and venue match exactly: Nagi, Ducatelle, Di Caro, Ciresan, Meier, Giusti, F. Nagi, Schmidhuber, and Gambardella, published at the 2011 IEEE ICSIPA conference (DOI: 10.1109/ICSIPA.2011.6144164). The automated checkers likely missed it due to the hyphenation difference in the title.
LINK: https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/Max-pooling-convolutional-neural-networks-for-hand-Nagi-Ducatelle/5418b86c85c662f76f3e69da922f53a03d2ec3c3
